arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham clarifies foul-mouthed referee rant after receiving red card
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham was given a red card during Real Madrid’s draw with Osasuna on Saturday and the England midfielder and boss Carlo Ancelotti have given their verdicts
Real Madrid announced the departure of Oihane Hernández for the NWSL side Orlando Pride . Since this match, Hernández didn’t feature another minute for the club.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham sends emphatic message to Osasuna referee after red card
arts.sum: In a calm manner, the Englishman sought to clarify what he said to official José Luis Munuera Montero during the game in Pamplona that led to his direct red card. By referring to the Spanish term, Bellingham was seemingly attempting to indicate his use of the phrase “fuck off” was down to his annoyance at the situation, not an insult aimed at the referee.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “In the last three games, many things have happened and everyone has seen them”
arts.sum: “The VAR has checked things in our area and not in the opponent's, as happened at the beginning of the match. In the last three games, many things have happened that everyone has seen.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola offers Erling Haaland injury update after Man City scare before Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Erling Haaland suffered a knee injury during Manchester City's 4-0 win over Newcastle and Pep Guardiola has offered an update on the forward ahead of their clash with Real Madrid on Wednesday
